untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires multi-bar morphological analysis: (1) identification of two distinct peaks separated by ~4 months with different visual shapes (Adam as inverted V spike vs Eve as rounder/wider), (2) detection of confirmation line and pullback structure. These multi-timeframe pattern recognition features cannot be expressed as simple 3-field indicator comparisons. Only high-level proxies (wick vs body ratio, price rejection) are available from allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial proxy: entry conditions use upper_wick > body to detect sharp spike-like behavior (Adam characteristic) and close < prev_high to suggest rejection. Exit uses SMA crossover as reversal signal (72% success rate on downside suggests mean reversion). However, this cannot capture the true dual-peak morphology or 128-day lead time. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic or multi-bar state machine outside the indicator-based rule engine.
